name: accelix-ai-plugins
description: AccelixGames team plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-plastic-scm
plugins.description: PlasticSCM (Unity Version Control) workflow automation — checkin, merge comments, branch info, status, history, diff

plugins.name: win-file-tools
plugins.description: Windows document tools — file reading with error patterns, HWP/HWPX creation and editing

plugins.name: generate-image
plugins.description: AI image generation for game design communication — ideation and detail modes via Gemini/Imagen MCP

plugins.name: discord-webhook
plugins.description: Discord webhook message and file delivery — multi-channel, natural-language mentions, file attachments
